title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Khadim's Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Khadim's Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's Capital India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's Capital India:
Khadim's Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
